headline: PE Momentum Shifts to Operational Excellence as Mega-Deals Drive 2026 Value Creation

stories.title: Apollo Acquires Nippon Sheet Glass for $3.7B in Largest Japan PE Deal
stories.summary: Apollo Global Management scored big with NSG, marking JP's largest PE buyout and Apollo's biggest market investment. Flipping the script from financial engineering to operational uplift through cost synergies and efficiency gains.
stories.takeaway: megadeals are back and PE is hunting for margin expansion through operational discipline in overlooked regions

stories.title: Clayton, Dubilier & Rice Finances $4.7B Sealed Air Acquisition with Leveraged Debt
stories.summary: CD&R secured $4.7bn in syndicated loans to fund its Sealed Air buyout, signaling renewed confidence in structured capital markets. Leverage is back, but only for quality assets with clear EBITDA growth pathways.
stories.takeaway: debt markets reopening for disciplined sponsors who can show real operational value creation, not just multiple arbitrage

stories.title: Paratek-Radius Merger Backed by $1.3B Blackstone Funding Package
stories.summary: Blackstone's $1.3bn investment in the pharma combo shows PE diving deep into healthcare consolidation. Strategic value creation hinges on R&D synergies and market consolidation rather than cost cuts.
stories.takeaway: Healthcare PE is pivoting from operational trimming to revenue synergies and pipeline optimization

stories.title: ContiTech Industrial Division Attracts Bidding War from Apollo and Bain Capital
stories.summary: Apollo and Bain among finalists for Continental AG's industrial unit, signaling tech-enabled manufacturing is prime PE hunting ground. Winners will deploy AI-driven ops and automation to unlock hidden margin.
stories.takeaway: Industrials PE is hunting for digital transformation plays where automation and AI can drive 20%+ margin upside

watchNext.title: 2026 Global Private Equity Report: 12 is the New 5
watchNext.why: Bain's flagship research frames the value creation playbook for 2026 - faster EBITDA growth now mandatory, old leverage plays dead, execution on Day 1 is make-or-break

watchNext.title: McKinsey Global Private Markets Report 2026: Operational Alpha Now Rules
watchNext.why: McKinsey's deep dive shows LPs ranking value creation strategy third most important after performance and team quality - ops muscle is literally what separates winners from everyone else rn
